content.query:
CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL Managed_Serv_ID_AzureSynape_AzureBlob_cred
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Service Identity' ;


CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss
WITH
  ( TYPE = HADOOP ,
    LOCATION = N'abfss://finrefdata@renuityreferencedata.dfs.core.windows.net' ,
    CREDENTIAL = Managed_Serv_ID_AzureSynape_AzureBlob_cred
  ) ;



CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row
WITH (  
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS ( FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',', STRING_DELIMITER = '"', FIRST_ROW = 2   )
);
GO


CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_ADDBACKS]
( 
	[Vendor] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Comments] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[Tick Mark (old)] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[Tick Mark] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[Proforma] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[GL Account] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[GL Description] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[FSLI] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DEAL] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Company] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Sub Category (old)] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Sub Category] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FS Grouping] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Month] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Type] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Action] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Amount] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[FinPeriodID] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[BranchCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Date Check] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Branch Check] [nvarchar](100)  NULL

)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/Addbacks.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO




CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_BUDGET]
( 
	[Level 1] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Level 2] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountCode] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[SubAccount] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[Subaccount Name] [nvarchar](400)  NULL,
	[Type] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[OPCO] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Date] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Amount] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[BranchCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[DepartmentID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[MarketingAccountID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[FinPeriodID] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Date Check] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/Budget.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO



CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_OUT_OF_PERIOD]
( 
	[Source] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Period] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FS Line Item Description] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[AccountCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[GL Account Description] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[Description] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL
)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/Out-Of-Period.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO



CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_PERFORMA_DATA]
(
	[BranchCode]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AccountCode]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Date]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Amount]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Branch Check]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Date Check]  [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FinPeriodID]  [nvarchar](20)  NULL
)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/ProformaData.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO



CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_NET_SALES]
(
	
	[Rank]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Division]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Period]	[nvarchar](20) NULL,
	[Product]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Market]	[nvarchar](500) NULL,
	[Net Sales #]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Net Sales $]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Type]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Division2]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Branch]	[nvarchar](500) NULL,
	[Branch Code]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Date]	[nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[Department ID]	[nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[FINPeriod]	[nvarchar](20) NULL

)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/NetSales.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO


---New 
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_FORECAST_3PLUS9]
(
	
[Company Group] [nvarchar](100) NULL,

[BranchName] [nvarchar](100) NULL,

[MarketingAccount] [nvarchar](100) NULL,

[DepartmentID] [nvarchar](20) NULL,
[FS Line Item] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
[Date] [nvarchar](20) NULL, 
[Amount] [nvarchar](20) NULL,
[AccountCode] [nvarchar](20) NULL,

)

	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO



CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[FIN_REF_DATA_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY]
(
[FS Line Item]	nvarchar(500) NULL
,[Parent] nvarchar(500) NULL
,[AccountCode] nvarchar(100) NULL
,[AccountClass] nvarchar(100) NULL
,[AccountDescription] 	nvarchar(500) NULL
,[Type]	nvarchar(50) NULL	
,[Subtotal] nvarchar(10) NULL
,[Sign]	nvarchar(10) NULL
,[Intercompany]	nvarchar(10) NULL
,[Cash Flow Account] nvarchar(100) NULL
)
WITH 
(
	DATA_SOURCE = [ext_src_finrefdata_renuity_reference_data_abfss], 
	LOCATION = N'Financial_Ref_Data/Account_Hierarchy.csv', 
	FILE_FORMAT = [ext_fmt_quoted_csv_with_header_row], 
	REJECT_TYPE = VALUE, 
	REJECT_VALUE = 0 
	--,TABLE_OPTIONS = N'{"READ_OPTIONS":["ALLOW_INCONSISTENT_READS"]}'
)
GO
